title: arenaria balansae var. glaberrima
intro: Arenaria balansae var. glaberrima is a plant species, also known as Chinese sandwort, which belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. Arenaria balansae var. glaberrima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
